EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRelativeMainlineLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Relative Mainline layout.

[Guid("3C62E3CC-255F-4820-AD3A-D121202A8D95")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRelativeMainlineLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

AlignmentAttributeName

Indicates the name of the network attribute that is used to align lines that are split.

string AlignmentAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

BranchValues

Indicates the TypeAttributeName values that identify the diagram edges that are branches.

object[] BranchValues { get; set; }

Property Value

object[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

BreakPointAngle

Indicates the angle comprised between 30Â° and 90Â° that is used to position the break point on the first and last segments of the edges; that is, on the edge segments parallel to the tree direction.

double BreakPointAngle { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressAlongDirection

Indicates whether the graph is compressed to reduce the distances between adjacent groups of neighbor diagram junctions along the direction while maintaining relative positioning between these groups.

bool CompressAlongDirection { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressionRatio

Percentage number that indicates the compression factor that is applied along the direction.

double CompressionRatio { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Direction

Indicates the direction of the main line.

esriLayoutTreeDirection Direction { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutTreeDirection

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExcludedValues

Indicates the TypeAttributeName values that identify the diagram edges that are excluded from the straight lines (crossovers or laders).

object[] ExcludedValues { get; set; }

Property Value

object[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsActive 

bool IsActive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

LengthAttributeName

Indicates the name of the network attribute that holds the initial length of the diagram edges.

string LengthAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LineAttributeName

Indicates the name of the network attribute that is used to identify the lines that comprise the straight lines.

string LineAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MainlineValues

Indicates the TypeAttributeName values that identify the diagram edges along the main lines.

object[] MainlineValues { get; set; }

Property Value

object[]

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinimalDistance

Indicates the minimal distance between two adjacent groups of neighbor diagram junctions where compression can occur.

double MinimalDistance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

OffsetBetweenBranches

Indicates the spacing between two adjacent branches along the axis perpendicular to the direction of the lines.

double OffsetBetweenBranches { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PreserveContainers 

bool PreserveContainers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

PropertySet 

IPropertySet PropertySet { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

TypeAttributeName

Indicates the name of the network attribute that is used to qualify the lines.

string TypeAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

int Version { get; }
